sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n87789" key="prokiqw/nion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προκῐθ-ώνιον</orth> (<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">προκιόνιον</foreign> cod.), <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n87789.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">πρόρινον</ref></xr>, Id.</sense> </entryFree>
